displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Assassin
displayProperties.description: Finishers and powered melee final blows grant invisibility.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Inmost Light
displayProperties.description: Using an ability empowers the other two abilities, granting them improved energy regeneration.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Ophidian
displayProperties.description: Weapons ready very quickly.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Star-Eater
displayProperties.description: While your Super energy is full, picking up an Orb of Power overcharges your Super, granting it bonus damage.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Synthoceps
displayProperties.description: Improves melee damage when you're surrounded.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Verity
displayProperties.description: Weapon final blows with a damage type matching your grenade grant a stacking grenade damage bonus and improved grenade regeneration.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Dragon
displayProperties.description: Your weapons ready quicker and are more stable. Using your class ability temporarily increases this benefit and reloads your equipped weapon from reserves.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Galanor
displayProperties.description: Hits and final blows with your Super will return Super energy after it ends.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Foetracer
displayProperties.description: Damaging a powerful combatant or Guardian with an ability grants you a temporary damage bonus for weapons matching that ability's element.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Caliban
displayProperties.description: Powered melee final blows trigger an ignition.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Renewal
displayProperties.description: Allies inside the Duskfield grenade field gain Frost Armor and targets inside the field deal reduced damage.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Cyrtarachne
displayProperties.description: Gain Woven Mail when you use your grenade.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Gyrfalcon
displayProperties.description: Your Void weapons gain volatile rounds after you emerge from being invisible.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Liar
displayProperties.description: Dealing damage with a powered melee or being hit by a melee attack will allow you to follow up with an extremely powerful Arc melee counterpunch.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Wormhusk
displayProperties.description: Activating your class ability grants Cure. Rapidly defeating combatants grants Burning Souls that increase the potency of healing when using Dodge and spread the healing to nearby allies.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Coyote
displayProperties.description: Gain an additional class ability charge.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Severance
displayProperties.description: Powered melee or finisher final blows unleash a damaging explosion.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Hoarfrost
displayProperties.description: Your Barricade becomes a wall of Stasis crystals that slows nearby targets when created. Activating Thruster creates Stasis crystals.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Eternal Warrior
displayProperties.description: Gain bonus damage for weapons matching your Super's element when your Super ends.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Abeyant
displayProperties.description: Improves Drengr's Lash. Drengr's Lash projectiles track targets more aggressively and travel farther.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Bear
displayProperties.description: Move faster while guarding with the Unbreakable shield. Damage blocked with Unbreakable is converted to grenade energy.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Contact
displayProperties.description: Damaging a target with a powered melee causes all nearby targets to suffer lightning strikes and become jolted.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Scars
displayProperties.description: Final blows with weapons that have a damage type matching your Super's element create a burst of healing around you that grants allies restoration.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Horn
displayProperties.description: Your class ability unleashes waves of Solar energy that damage and scorch nearby targets. Combatants damaged and Guardians defeated by these waves are enveloped in a Sunspot.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Alpha Lupi
displayProperties.description: Creates a healing pulse when your class ability is activated. Healing allies provides class ability energy.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Armamentarium
displayProperties.description: Gain an additional grenade charge.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Stag
displayProperties.description: Your Rift provides damage reduction to allies standing in it.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Filaments
displayProperties.description: Casting an Empowering Rift will grant you Devour. Defeating a target while Devour is active grants class ability energy.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Necrotic
displayProperties.description: Damaging a target with a melee inflicts potent corruption. Defeating targets afflicted by corruption spreads the condition.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Osmiomancy
displayProperties.description: Your grenades recharge quicker on hits. The seeker spawned from Coldsnap grenades travels farther.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Apotheosis
displayProperties.description: Temporarily gain greatly increased melee and grenade regeneration after your Super ends.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Vesper
displayProperties.description: Rifts periodically release Arc shockwaves.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Harmony
displayProperties.description: Final blows with weapons that have a damage type matching your Super's element grant you Super energy.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Starfire
displayProperties.description: Grenades recharge from empowered weapon damage, with empowered weapon final blows granting more energy.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Swarm
displayProperties.description: Destroying a Tangle spawns Threadlings.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Claw
displayProperties.description: Gain an additional melee charge.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of Competition
displayProperties.description: During Guardian Games 2020, completing Crucible matches, Gambit matches, Vanguard strikes, patrols, adventures, and forges grants additional Glimmer and XP rewards.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Season
displayProperties.description: Grants a chance to generate Dawning Spirit whenever you find a Dawning ingredient.

displayProperties.name: Spirit of the Dragon
displayProperties.description: Your weapons ready quicker and are more stable. Using your class ability temporarily increases this benefit and reloads your equipped weapon from reserves.

displayProperties.description: Hits and final blows with your Super will return Super energy after it ends.
